ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard used for the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for (e.g., male, female, unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the product is designed for (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., US 2, EU 32, UK 6) */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement */,
  "hip" INTEGER /* Hip measurement */,
  "hollow_to_floor" INTEGER /* Hollow to floor measurement */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height measurement */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the size standard is valid for (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing the size standard is for (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "shoulder_width" INTEGER /* Shoulder width measurement */,
  "inseam_length" INTEGER /* Inseam length measurement */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material type (e.g., cotton, polyester) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard used for the product */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level that triggers a reorder */,
  "last_restocked_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product size was last restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-category relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of each unit of the product in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time the review was made */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review has been approved for display */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
